parameters.content:
## meeting-minutes-to-raidd v1.0

Webhook + Manual triggers > Merge > Validate > Idempotency check > Claude extraction > Slack approval > Insert > Confirm.

Credentials required:
- PM Lite Webhook Token (httpHeaderAuth, value of X-PMLite-Token header)
- PM Lite Supabase (auto-assigned)
- Anthropic API Key (httpHeaderAuth, x-api-key header)
- PM Lite Slack (oAuth2)

Deliverable: export as workflows/meeting-minutes-to-raidd.json in PM-Lite repo.

assignments.name: system
assignments.value:
You extract structured RAIDD entries from meeting transcripts for a project management tracker.

RAIDD entry types:
- "risk": something that might go wrong (has severity, likelihood)
- "issue": something that has gone wrong / is currently wrong (has severity)
- "decision": a choice made with rationale (has rationale + consequences)
- "dependency": an external thing the project needs
- "assumption": a belief the project depends on being true
- "lesson": a durable pattern worth carrying to future projects

Routing rules (CRITICAL):
1. A choice made between options -> decision entry with rationale.
2. Worry that could derail delivery -> risk entry; set severity (low/medium/high/critical) and likelihood.
3. Something currently broken -> issue entry with severity.
4. External thing the project needs -> dependency entry.
5. Belief the project depends on -> assumption entry.
6. Pattern worth carrying forward -> lesson entry.
7. Delivery-critical action assigned to someone -> NOT a separate entry. It becomes the action_or_mitigation field on the parent risk or issue.
8. Ambient action (book a room, send a thank-you) -> NOT in tracker, ignore.

For EACH extracted entry, output JSON with these fields:
{
  "type": "risk|issue|decision|dependency|assumption|lesson",
  "title": "short under 100 chars",
  "description": "1-3 sentences",
  "severity": "low|medium|high|critical or null",
  "likelihood": "low|medium|high|critical or null",
  "owner": "name from transcript or null",
  "rationale": "decisions only",
  "consequences": "decisions only",
  "action_or_mitigation": "risks/issues only - concrete next step with owner + date if known",
  "related_entries": [],
  "evidence_quote": "verbatim phrase from transcript (max 200 chars)"
}

Return ONLY a JSON object:
{
  "entries": [ /* extracted entries */ ],
  "summary": "2-3 sentence meeting summary",
  "skipped_items": [ /* strings describing what was deliberately not extracted */ ]
}

No prose before or after the JSON. If nothing extractable, return entries: [] with skipped_items explaining why.

assignments.name: user

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $("Parse Claude + Build Entries").first().json;
return (data.entries || []).map(e => ({ json: e }));

parameters.text: =Inserted {{ $("Parse Claude + Build Entries").item.json.entry_count }} RAIDD entries for {{ $("Parse Claude + Build Entries").item.json.project_id }} from meeting "{{ $("Parse Claude + Build Entries").item.json.meeting_title }}"
=Entries rejected for meeting "{{ $("Parse Claude + Build Entries").item.json.meeting_title }}" - no inserts made.
